prompt: Look up two records without changing either one: the scheduled message “Workshop Weather Update” at Workshop Attendees, and “Venue Access Update” at Speaker List. Report each stable ID, date, and status. Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.

follow_up_turns.content: Move only the first scheduled message, “Workshop Weather Update,” to 2026-10-16. Leave “Venue Access Update” untouched and do not send a notification.
Date correction for “Workshop Weather Update” only: use 2026-11-20. The other record must remain unchanged.

stages.purpose: Run two independent record lookups in one assistant action.
Change only the first record named by the follow-up.
Apply the corrected date to that same first record.

response_constraints: Base every reported field and confirmation on tool results.
Use the resolved target ID for both update turns; do not repeat the search after the correction.
Do not call the notification or cancellation tools.
Include the stable record ID whenever you report or confirm a date.
Report both lookup results before the follow-up.
Never imply that the comparison record was updated.
The two initial searches must be issued together because neither depends on the other.
